summary: Frontend-only refinement-pass verification on Pritpal Singh portfolio. Tested all 19 spec items across desktop (1920/1440), tablet (768), and mobile (390) viewports. 38/38 effective checks PASSED. No backend tested (frontend-only request). Profile image, resume download, sidebar (3 items + separators), mobile nav (pill w/ pipes, hide-on-scroll w/ ~220ms idle reveal), hero copy (no PORTFOLIO V1.0, no Open-to-Work badge/ring), Copy Email literal text, section headers w/o numbering, ArrowRight icon w/ x-translate on hover, project-preview hidden on mobile / visible desktop, experience timeline (no POS GTM, Omniful = Growth Manager (Founding) / Jan '25 — Present / 11 months, all entries have duration line), ScrollToTop on /projects /writing /playground navigation, click-pop ring (no .click-pop-dot, cleaned up <650ms), no console errors on subroutes, no horizontal overflow at any breakpoint — all verified.
action_items: OPTIONAL (non-breaking, spec-acknowledged): CommandPalette.jsx still contains a 'View Certifications (LinkedIn)' entry. The spec states the palette should only contain home/projects/playground/writing/resume/linkedin. Palette no longer has 'contact' (correct). Main agent may want to drop the certifications entry to fully match the spec. Spec note already flags this as a known minor deviation.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx & MobileNav.jsx duplicate the ITEMS array + handle() function — could be extracted into a shared hook/util for DRY (low priority).
MobileNav 220ms idle reveal works correctly but uses Math.abs(y-lastY) > 4 threshold; gentle finger scrolls under 4px won't hide nav. Acceptable for intent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React portfolio with local JSON data. Public preview URL set in /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Asset PDFs/images served from /app/frontend/public/assets/. data-testid coverage is excellent across Sidebar (nav-{id}, nav-sep-{idx}), MobileNav (mnav-{id}, mnav-sep-{i}), Hero (profile-image, cta-resume, cta-copy-email, hero-name, hero-tagline), Projects (project-list, project-item-{slug}, project-preview, project-open-case), Experience (exp-{i}). CMD+K palette opens via Meta+k. ScrollToTop component in App.js handles route-change scrolling via behavior:'instant'.

verified_behaviors.assets: Pritpal_Singh_HeadShot.png loads (naturalWidth=1254), Pritpal_Singh_Resume.pdf returns 200 over preview URL
verified_behaviors.sidebar: Exactly nav-writing, nav-linkedin, nav-resume + nav-sep-1, nav-sep-2; removed testids (nav-home/playground/experience/certifications/contact/divider) all absent
verified_behaviors.linkedin_action: nav-linkedin opens https://www.linkedin.com/in/oye-pritpal in a new tab
verified_behaviors.resume_action: nav-resume triggers Playwright download event w/ filename Pritpal_Singh_Resume.pdf; no new tab opened
verified_behaviors.hero: No 'PORTFOLIO · V1.0' text; no [data-testid=open-to-work] node; no .otw-ring class; Copy Email button shows literal 'Copy Email'
verified_behaviors.section_numbering: No '01 ·' / '02 ·' prefixes on any visible section header
verified_behaviors.project_arrow: SVG class is 'lucide lucide-arrow-right'; hover applies matrix(1,0,0,1,4.08,0) translate (not rotate)
verified_behaviors.project_preview: Visible on desktop (1440x900 → 449x782 px); hidden on mobile (390 → width=0)
verified_behaviors.experience: 5 entries, no POS GTM, Omniful first w/ Growth Manager (Founding) + Jan '25 — Present + 11 months; all entries show duration line
verified_behaviors.click_pop: Single .click-pop ring inserted, removed within ~650ms; zero .click-pop-dot elements anywhere; no WebAudio console errors
verified_behaviors.mobile_nav: Pill with mnav-writing/linkedin/resume + mnav-sep-1/mnav-sep-2; labels Writing/LinkedIn/Resume visible; reappears with opacity 1 after scroll stops
